# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: example-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    baseInstanceName: example-instance
    zone: us-central1-a
    targetSize: 3
    version:
      name: instance-template-1
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.example-instance-template)
- name: example-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    properties:
      machineType: f1-micro
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-9
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
